name: Lumière
description: A self-hostable dashboard for tracking personal projects, with a plugin architecture and a keyboard-first UI.
highlights: Designed a plugin API that lets third parties add panels without forking the core.
Full keyboard navigation and command palette for power users.
Ships as a single static bundle or a Dockerized service.

name: Gustave Engine
description: A small turn-based combat prototype exploring timing-based parry mechanics, built to learn game loops and state machines.
highlights: Deterministic, frame-accurate turn resolution suitable for replays.
Data-driven skill definitions loaded from JSON.
60fps canvas renderer with a hand-rolled tween system.

name: Maelle CLI
description: A developer CLI that scaffolds typed API clients from an OpenAPI spec, with sensible defaults and zero config.
highlights: Generates fully typed clients with runtime validation.
Pluggable templates for fetch, axios, or custom transports.
Published to npm with a tidy, well-documented API.

name: Verso Notes
description: A local-first, markdown note-taking app with bidirectional links and offline sync.
highlights: CRDT-based sync so edits merge cleanly across devices.
Instant full-text search over thousands of notes.
Works fully offline as a PWA.
